## Summary

Describe what changed and why this PR should be merged.

## Related Issue

Link the related issue, or explain why there is not one.

## Validation

Describe how you verified the change locally.

- `pnpm lint`
- `pnpm build`
- Manual testing notes:

## Screenshots Or UI Notes

Add screenshots, recordings, or "not applicable" for non-UI changes.

## Lifecycle Notes

State anything reviewers should know if this PR is superseded, closed without merge, or needs follow-up work on the same branch.

## Checklist

- [ ] I explained the purpose of this PR clearly.
- [ ] I linked the related issue or explained why one is not needed.
- [ ] I documented how this change was validated.
- [ ] I added screenshots or UI notes when the change affects the interface.
- [ ] I understand merged PR branches should be deleted when they are no longer needed.
- [ ] If this PR is closed without merge, I will leave a short note explaining whether the branch should be kept or deleted.
